payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: A tall dark-brown wooden cabinet/closet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and subtle vertical wood grain; matte finish with light scuffing and a slight central sheen, no visible hardware, and the left edge of the door is slightly cropped by the image border. Estimated distance from camera ~1.2 m.
